title: you can notmiss out Australian screenings by madman
display_title: you can notmiss out Australian screenings by madman
wikitext:
[]: you can (not)miss out, Australian screenings by madman             Quote Post by Zeak » Tue Jun 27, 2017 3:47 pm For those interested madman are screening the films in major cinema's across the country. https://www.madman.com.au/news/tickets- ... australia/

[]: Re: you can (not)miss out, Australian screenings by madman             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Tue Jun 27, 2017 5:41 pm Sweet, thanks for the heads up mate

[]: Re: you can (not)miss out, Australian screenings by madman             Quote Post by The Cruel » Wed Jun 28, 2017 2:53 pm When I've read that Rebuild 'll be shown again in cinemas, I was surprised, because July 20th is my birthday and that's also right after EoE's 20th Anniversary on July 19th and I've already planned to watch Eva again around that time. Though I'm wondering why would Madman advertise Rebuild again even if they've already released Rebuild on DVD and Blu-Ray. Is it just to make money? Or do they want to find new viewers to have their attention on Eva so to prepare them for 3.0+1.0? This must mean something importaint, or what do you think of that?

[]: Re: you can (not)miss out, Australian screenings by madman             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Jun 28, 2017 5:26 pm The Cruel wrote: Or do they want to find new viewers to have their attention on Eva so to prepare them for 3.0+1.0? This must mean something importaint, or what do you think of that?

[]: Re: you can (not)miss out, Australian screenings by madman             Quote Post by The Cruel » Wed Jun 28, 2017 6:39 pm Joseki wrote: Maybe they have analyzed their sales trends and noticed that Evangelion is "hot" right now and decided to capitalize on it. I don't think it's a decision directly influenced by 3.0+1.0, simply because I think that not even Anno is sure of when the movie will come out. They have internal deadlines but it don't mean they can miss them, and they are confidential.

[]: Re: you can (not)miss out, Australian screenings by madman             Quote Post by Zeak » Thu Jun 29, 2017 4:30 pm Think there has been a push for it for a while. Given super Nova has just been and the presence they had there its probably got something to do with it
